rationale: No wildfire events, no EU energy shocks, and Iran deal stalemate has only distant indirect relevance; this is a low-impact cycle for a Portuguese resident.

top_events.title: Tehran contradicts Trump on Iran deal — energy price uncertainty lingers
top_events.summary: Unresolved Iran diplomacy keeps a mild ceiling on global oil price relief, indirectly affecting Portugal's energy costs, but no acute change this cycle.

top_events.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands on migrant crisis
top_events.summary: Pope's visit to Spain's Canary Islands highlights Atlantic migration routes — geographically close to Portugal and relevant to Iberian political discourse on migration.

top_events.title: World Cup opens in Mexico amid protests and heat warnings
top_events.summary: World Cup underway in North America; weather and logistics concerns noted but no direct impact on Portugal's economy or daily life beyond tourism sentiment.
